title.en: Wireless network management: the housekeeping toolbox
title.zh: 无线网络管理：网络运维工具箱

blocks.en: Moving data is only half of what a real Wi-Fi network does. The other half is housekeeping: keeping a dozing laptop from being kicked off, nudging a phone toward a less crowded access point, sparing battery-powered gadgets from a constant drizzle of broadcast noise, and answering the everyday questions 'where am I?' and 'what time is it, exactly?'. IEEE 802.11 anticipates these real-world deployment headaches and ships a whole suite of built-in remedies. This lesson surveys that toolbox.
blocks.zh: 传输数据只是一张真实 Wi-Fi 网络要做的一半工作，另一半是“运维家务”：别在笔记本打盹时把它踢下线、把手机引导到不那么拥挤的接入点、让靠电池供电的小设备不必整天淋着广播噪声，还要回答日常问题——“我在哪儿？”“现在到底几点？”。IEEE 802.11 预见到了这些真实部署中的烦恼，并内置了一整套补救手段。本课就来梳理这个工具箱。

blocks.en: The headline feature is Wireless Network Management (WNM). WNM is not one mechanism but a grab-bag of quality-of-life services that let stations and APs exchange operational information so each side is more aware of the network's topology, load, and conditions. The standard lists roughly two dozen of these services. The point isn't to memorise them — it's to feel the pattern: almost every awkward situation in a busy deployment has a named WNM remedy sitting ready in the spec.
blocks.zh: 压轴主角是“无线网络管理”（Wireless Network Management，WNM）。WNM 并不是单一机制，而是一组提升使用体验的“杂烩”服务，让站点与 AP 交换运行信息，使双方都更了解网络的拓扑、负载与状况。标准里列出了大约两打这样的服务。重点不在于把它们背下来，而是体会其中的规律：在繁忙部署里几乎每一种尴尬场景，规范里都准备好了一个有名有姓的 WNM 补救手段。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 260" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="170" y="110" width="120" height="40" rx="6"/><text x="230" y="135" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">WNM toolbox</text><rect x="10" y="10" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="80" y="32" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Stay connected</text><rect x="160" y="10" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="230" y="32" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Steer & balance</text><rect x="310" y="10" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="380" y="32" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Sleep through noise</text><rect x="10" y="216" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="80" y="238" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Where & when</text><rect x="160" y="216" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="230" y="238" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Report & diagnose</text><rect x="310" y="216" width="140" height="34" rx="5"/><text x="380" y="238" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Virtual networks</text><line x1="170" y1="120" x2="80" y2="44"/><line x1="250" y1="110" x2="230" y2="44"/><line x1="285" y1="118" x2="380" y2="44"/><line x1="180" y1="150" x2="80" y2="216"/><line x1="230" y1="150" x2="230" y2="216"/><line x1="285" y1="145" x2="380" y2="216"/></svg>

caption.en: The WNM services cluster into a few everyday themes, all hanging off one toolbox.
caption.zh: WNM 各项服务可归入几个日常主题，全都挂在同一个工具箱上。

blocks.en: Start with staying connected and saving power. BSS max idle period management lets the AP promise not to disassociate a station just because it has gone quiet for a while — 'don't kick me while I doze'. WNM sleep mode goes further: a station can announce it will sleep for a long stretch, skipping DTIM beacons and key updates while staying associated. Around these sit power helpers like FMS (an alternate, less frequent wake-up schedule for group traffic), TIM broadcast (learn there's buffered traffic without waiting for a full Beacon), and U-APSD coexistence (hint a transmission duration so the AP sends when you can actually hear it).
blocks.zh: 先看“保持在线 + 省电”。BSS 最大空闲周期管理（BSS max idle period management）让 AP 承诺：不会仅仅因为站点安静了一阵就把它解除关联——也就是“别在我打盹时踢我”。WNM 睡眠模式更进一步：站点可以声明自己要长睡一段时间，期间跳过 DTIM 信标和密钥更新，却仍保持关联。围绕这些还有一批省电助手，如 FMS（为组播流量提供一个更稀疏的替代唤醒节奏）、TIM 广播（不必等完整信标就能得知有缓存流量）以及 U-APSD 共存（提示一个发送时长，让 AP 在你确实听得到的时候才发）。

blocks.en: Next comes steering and shielding. BSS transition management lets the AP politely steer a station to a specific or preferred AP for load balancing or because a BSS is shutting down — the basis of 'band steering' and graceful roaming. Channel usage advises which channels to pick for non-infrastructure links. And to shield dozing stations from broadcast clutter, Proxy ARP lets the AP answer ARP/IPv6-ND queries itself (or unicast them) instead of flooding the air, while DMS turns group-addressed frames a station actually wants into individually addressed ones it can receive reliably.
blocks.zh: 接着是“引导与遮挡”。BSS 过渡管理（BSS transition management）让 AP 出于负载均衡，或因某个 BSS 即将关闭，礼貌地把站点引导到指定或优选的 AP——这正是“频段引导”和平滑漫游的基础。信道使用（channel usage）则建议在非基础设施链路上挑选哪些信道。为了替打盹的站点挡住广播杂音，代理 ARP（Proxy ARP）让 AP 自己回应 ARP/IPv6-ND 查询（或改用单播），而不是把它们灌满空口；DMS（定向组播服务）则把站点确实想要的组播帧转成可靠收取的单播帧。

blocks.en: Notice the recurring motive: broadcast and multicast traffic is the enemy of battery life, because a sleeping station must wake for every group-addressed frame whether it cares or not. Proxy ARP, DMS, FMS, and TIM broadcast are four different angles of attack on that one problem — that's why they keep showing up together.
blocks.zh: 留意这条反复出现的动机：广播与组播流量是续航的天敌——因为只要有组播帧，正在睡觉的站点就得醒来，无论它在不在乎。代理 ARP、DMS、FMS 与 TIM 广播，是从四个不同角度攻击同一个问题，这正是它们总是结伴出现的原因。

blocks.en: Then the 'where and when' family. Location services let stations configure and exchange location data (geospatial or civic), useful for things like emergency calling. Timing Measurement lets a receiver align its clock to the sender's and track drift over time. FTM (fine timing measurement) measures round-trip time to peers so a station can compute its position by ranging — and can even estimate angle of arrival or departure. Multiple BSSID capability is the deployment trick that lets one radio advertise many virtual networks (think a guest SSID and a corporate SSID) inside a single Beacon instead of one Beacon per SSID.
blocks.zh: 再来是“在哪儿、何时”这一家族。位置服务（location services）让站点配置并交换位置数据（地理坐标或行政地址），可用于紧急呼叫等场景。定时测量（Timing Measurement）让接收方把自己的时钟对齐到发送方，并随时间跟踪漂移。FTM（精细定时测量）测量与对端的往返时延，使站点能通过测距算出自身位置——甚至还能估计到达角或离开角。多 BSSID 能力（Multiple BSSID）则是一种部署小技巧：让一台射频在一帧信标里就广告出多个虚拟网络（比如访客 SSID 和企业 SSID），而不必为每个 SSID 各发一帧信标。

blocks.en: Finally the reporting and coexistence family rounds out the toolbox: diagnostic, event, multicast-diagnostic, and triggered-statistics reporting let an AP ask a station to describe its hardware, log notable events (transitions, BSS-color collisions, peer links), or report when a metric crosses a threshold. Colocated interference reporting surfaces self-interference from other radios in the same device. Traffic filtering discards frames a station doesn't want; SSID list trims probe traffic; and WNM notification carries events like a firmware-update hint. Beyond WNM, clause 4 also frames the squishy realities of coverage — the 'area' concept, since RF has no sharp edges — and the special rules for licensed bands, where Dynamic STA Enablement (DSE) and a Contention Based Protocol (CBP) keep uncoordinated licensees from clobbering each other.
blocks.zh: 最后，“上报与共存”家族为工具箱收尾：诊断（diagnostic）、事件（event）、组播诊断（multicast diagnostic）与触发式统计（triggered statistics）上报，让 AP 能请站点描述自己的硬件、记录值得注意的事件（过渡、BSS color 冲突、点对点链路），或在某项指标越过阈值时上报。同位干扰上报（colocated interference reporting）则揭示来自同一设备里其它射频的自干扰。流量过滤（traffic filtering）丢弃站点不想要的帧；SSID 列表（SSID list）精简探测流量；WNM 通知（WNM notification）承载诸如固件更新提示之类的事件。在 WNM 之外，clause 4 还刻画了覆盖范围这件“说不清”的现实——“区域（area）”概念，因为射频没有清晰边界——以及授权频段里的特殊规则：动态站点启用（DSE）与基于竞争的协议（CBP），让互不协调的持照者彼此不至于互相压制。

summary.en: What the spec actually lists under WNM — and the licensed-band corner
summary.zh: 规范在 WNM 名下究竟列了什么——以及授权频段那个角落

blocks.en: Clause 4.3.22.1 frames WNM as a way for STAs to exchange operational data so each is aware of topology, load, and colocated interference, plus exchanging location, supporting multiple BSSID on one infrastructure, efficient group-addressed delivery, and a long-sleep WNM sleep mode. It then enumerates the service list (4.3.22.2 onward): BSS max idle, BSS transition management, channel usage, colocated interference reporting, diagnostic reporting, DMS, event reporting, FMS, location services, multicast diagnostic, multiple BSSID, Proxy ARP, QoS traffic capability, SSID list, triggered STA statistics, TIM broadcast, timing measurement, FTM, traffic filtering, U-APSD coexistence, WNM notification, and WNM sleep mode. Separately, 4.3.6 cautions that wireless coverage has no well-defined boundary — the spec uses 'area' only by convention since field strength can vary 50 dB even in a static room. And 4.3.12 covers operation in licensed bands: DSE (4.3.12.2) automates channel provisioning and regulatory control for dependent STAs, while CBP (4.3.12.3) — essentially CSMA/CA — provides 'reasonable opportunities for other transmitters to operate' where overlapping licensees share spectrum, with DSE STA identification (4.3.12.4) used to resolve interference complaints.
blocks.zh: 4.3.22.1 节把 WNM 定义为：让站点交换运行数据，以便各自了解拓扑、负载和同位干扰，并交换位置、在同一套基础设施上支持多 BSSID、高效投递组播帧，以及提供可长睡的 WNM 睡眠模式。随后它列举了服务清单（从 4.3.22.2 起）：BSS 最大空闲、BSS 过渡管理、信道使用、同位干扰上报、诊断上报、DMS、事件上报、FMS、位置服务、组播诊断、多 BSSID、代理 ARP、QoS 流量能力、SSID 列表、触发式站点统计、TIM 广播、定时测量、FTM、流量过滤、U-APSD 共存、WNM 通知、WNM 睡眠模式。另外，4.3.6 提醒：无线覆盖并没有清晰边界——规范只是按惯例使用“区域”一词，因为即便在静止房间里，场强差异也可达 50 dB。而 4.3.12 讲授权频段下的运行：DSE（4.3.12.2）为从属站点自动化信道分配与监管控制，CBP（4.3.12.3）——本质上就是 CSMA/CA——在持照者重叠共享频谱时“为其它发射方提供合理的发送机会”，并用 DSE 站点标识（4.3.12.4）来化解干扰投诉。

cites.note: 4.3.6 Area concepts — wireless coverage has no well-defined boundary; 50 dB variation even in a static room
4.3.12 Operation in licensed bands — DSE, CBP, DSE STA identification for interference resolution
